---
title: "causal_analysis"
author: "Eric Dien"
date: "2026-02-25"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(MatchIt)
library(survey)
library(ggdag)


df <- fread("SATrainF25.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    obese = as.numeric(BMI.Category == "Obese"),
    sex = factor(sex),
    AGE.Category = factor(AGE.Category),
    Alcoholic.Status = factor(Alcoholic.Status),
    Smoking.Status = factor(Smoking.Status)
  )

cat("Treatment distribution:\n"); table(df$obese)

df %>% group_by(obese) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_SBP = mean(SBP, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_SBP = sd(SBP, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>% print()

# MODEL A with waistline

modA_ols <- lm(SBP ~ obese + sex + AGE.Category + Alcoholic.Status +
                 Smoking.Status + waistline + tot_chole + triglyceride, df)
summary(modA_ols)

matchA <- matchit(obese ~ sex + AGE.Category + Alcoholic.Status +
                    Smoking.Status + waistline + tot_chole + triglyceride,
                  data = df, method = "nearest")
A_data <- match.data(matchA)
modA_psm <- lm(SBP ~ obese, A_data)
summary(modA_psm)

psA <- glm(obese ~ sex + AGE.Category + Alcoholic.Status +
             Smoking.Status + waistline + tot_chole + triglyceride,
           df, family = binomial())
df$wA <- ifelse(df$obese == 1, 1/predict(psA, type = "response"),
                              1/(1 - predict(psA, type = "response")))
df$wA <- pmin(pmax(df$wA, quantile(df$wA, .01)), quantile(df$wA, .99))
modA_ipw <- svyglm(SBP ~ obese, svydesign(ids = ~1, weights = ~wA, data = df))
summary(modA_ipw)

png("loveplot_with_waistline.png", 800, 500, res = 120)
plot(summary(matchA), abs = TRUE, main = "Balance: Model A")
dev.off()

# MODEL B without Waistline 
modB_ols <- lm(SBP ~ obese + sex + AGE.Category + Alcoholic.Status +
                 Smoking.Status + tot_chole + triglyceride, df)
summary(modB_ols)

matchB <- matchit(obese ~ sex + AGE.Category + Alcoholic.Status +
                    Smoking.Status + tot_chole + triglyceride,
                  df, method = "nearest")
B_data <- match.data(matchB)
modB_psm <- lm(SBP ~ obese, B_data)
summary(modB_psm)

psB <- glm(obese ~ sex + AGE.Category + Alcoholic.Status +
             Smoking.Status + tot_chole + triglyceride,
           df, family = binomial())
df$wB <- ifelse(df$obese == 1, 1/predict(psB, type = "response"),
                              1/(1 - predict(psB, type = "response")))
df$wB <- pmin(pmax(df$wB, quantile(df$wB, .01)), quantile(df$wB, .99))
modB_ipw <- svyglm(SBP ~ obese, svydesign(ids = ~1, weights = ~wB, data = df))
summary(modB_ipw)

png("loveplot_no_waistline.png", 800, 500, res = 120)
plot(summary(matchB), abs = TRUE, main = "Balance: Model B")
dev.off()

dag <- dagify(
  SBP ~ Obesity + Waistline + Age + Sex + Smoking + Alcohol + Cholesterol + Triglycerides,
  Waistline ~ Obesity + Age + Sex,
  Obesity ~ Age + Sex + Smoking + Alcohol + Cholesterol + Triglycerides,
  
  coords = list(
    x = c(Obesity = 0,   Waistline = 1.5,  SBP = 3,
          Age = -1,      Sex = -1,          Smoking = -1.5,
          Alcohol = 0,   Cholesterol = 1.5, Triglycerides = 3),
    y = c(Obesity = 0,   Waistline = 0,     SBP = 0,
          Age = 1.2,     Sex = -1.2,        Smoking = 0,
          Alcohol = 2,   Cholesterol = 2,   Triglycerides = 2)
  ),
  
  exposure = "Obesity",
  outcome = "SBP"
)

ggdag_status(dag, use_labels = "name", text = FALSE) +
  theme_dag() +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("exposure" = "blue", 
               "outcome"  = "pink"),
    labels = c("exposure" = "Treatment", 
               "outcome"  = "Outcome"),
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 5))) +
  labs(title = "DAG: Causal Effect of Obesity on SBP") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  )


#CATE BY AGE FOR MODEL B 

cate <- df %>% group_by(AGE.Category) %>% group_map(~{
  fit <- lm(SBP ~ obese + sex + Alcoholic.Status + Smoking.Status +
              tot_chole + triglyceride, data = .x)
  tibble(
    AGE.Category = .y$AGE.Category,
    estimate = coef(fit)["obese"],
    se = summary(fit)$coefficients["obese","Std. Error"],
    pval = summary(fit)$coefficients["obese","Pr(>|t|)"]
  )
}) %>% bind_rows()

cate

ggsave("cate_by_age.png",
       cate %>%
         mutate(lower = estimate - 1.96*se,
                upper = estimate + 1.96*se) %>%
         ggplot(aes(AGE.Category, estimate)) +
         geom_point() +
         geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0.1) +
         geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
         theme_minimal())



b <- coef(modB_psm)["obese"]
se <- summary(modB_psm)$coefficients["obese","Std. Error"]
d <- b / summary(modB_psm)$sigma
E <- d + sqrt(d^2 + 1)

cat("\nE-value:", E, "\n")



results <- tibble(
  Model = rep(c("A","A","A","B","B","B"), each = 1),
  Method = rep(c("OLS","PSM","IPW"), 2),
  Estimate = c(coef(modA_ols)["obese"],
               coef(modA_psm)["obese"],
               coef(modA_ipw)["obese"],
               coef(modB_ols)["obese"],
               coef(modB_psm)["obese"],
               coef(modB_ipw)["obese"])
)

results


total_effect  <- coef(modB_psm)["obese"]
direct_effect <- coef(modA_psm)["obese"]
indirect_effect <- total_effect - direct_effect
cat("Total:", total_effect, "| Direct:", direct_effect, 
    "| Indirect (via waistline):", indirect_effect, "\n")

se_psm <- summary(modB_psm)$coefficients["obese","Std. Error"]
d_ci   <- (b - 1.96 * se_psm) / summary(modB_psm)$sigma
E_ci   <- d_ci + sqrt(d_ci^2 + 1)
cat("E-value CI lower:", E_ci, "\n")

summary(matchA)
summary(matchB)

mod_interact <- lm(SBP ~ obese * AGE.Category + sex + Alcoholic.Status +
                     Smoking.Status + tot_chole + triglyceride, df)
summary(mod_interact)$coefficients["obese:AGE.CategoryYOUNG", ]
```
